name: Portless
description: Installs portless for localhost subdomain routing. Declares a lace-managed proxy port with asymmetric mapping to portless's default port 1355.

proxyPort.description: Container-internal portless proxy port. With lace, this default is used as the container side of an asymmetric port mapping (e.g., 22435:1355). Not used by install.sh.

version.description: Portless version to install (npm version specifier).
